turns.user_message: I just sat at my desk for an hour yesterday and got nothing done. My mind felt completely blank.
That blank feeling is happening every single day now. I can't seem to focus on anything for more than a minute.
The emptiness in my head is so loud it's deafening. I feel like I'm just a shell sitting in this chair.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment.
